mapper.sql: id, created_time, updated_time, is_delete, profile_id, user_id, city_code, city_name, bio, gender, birthday
mapper.select: select from user_profiles where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select from user_profiles where profile_id = #{profileId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1

select from user_profiles
order by id desc

select from user_profiles
order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into user_profiles (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, profile_id, user_id, city_code, city_name, bio, gender, birthday) values (#{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{isDelete}, #{profileId}, #{userId}, #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, #{bio}, #{gender}, #{birthday})

insert into user_profiles (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, profile_id, user_id, city_code, city_name, bio, gender, birthday) values
(#{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.profileId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.cityCode}, #{item.cityName}, #{item.bio}, #{item.gender}, #{item.birthday})
mapper.update: update user_profiles set user_id = #{userId}, city_code = #{cityCode}, city_name = #{cityName}, bio = #{bio}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where id = #{id}

update user_profiles set user_id = #{userId}, city_code = #{cityCode}, city_name = #{cityName}, bio = #{bio}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where profile_id = #{profileId}

update.foreach: update user_profiles set user_id = #{item.userId}, city_code = #{item.cityCode}, city_name = #{item.cityName}, bio = #{item.bio}, gender = #{item.gender}, birthday = #{item.birthday}, updated_time = #{item.updatedTime}, is_delete = #{item.isDelete} where profile_id = #{item.profileId}
